mapper.select: SELECT ID, COMP_CD, USR_ID, USR_NM, LOGIN_ID, PWD_HASH, DEPT_CD, POS_CD, EMAIL, MOBILE, PURC_GRP_CD, LANG_CD, USR_TYP, VD_CD, PWD_FAIL_CNT, USE_YN, DEL_YN FROM CM_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CM_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CM_USER (COMP_CD, USR_ID, USR_NM, LOGIN_ID, PWD_HASH, DEPT_CD, POS_CD, EMAIL, MOBILE, PURC_GRP_CD, LANG_CD, USR_TYP, VD_CD, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{usrId}, #{usrNm}, #{loginId}, #{pwdHash}, #{deptCd}, #{posCd}, #{email}, #{mobile}, #{purcGrpCd}, NVL(#{langCd}, 'ko'), NVL(#{usrTyp}, 'EMP'), #{vdCd}, 'SYSTEM', 'SYSTEM')
mapper.update: UPDATE CM_USER SET LAST_LOGIN_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP, PWD_FAIL_CNT = 0 WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
mapper.select: SELECT ROLE_ID FROM CM_USER_ROLE WHERE COMP_CD = #{compCd} AND USR_ID = #{usrId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CM_USER_ROLE (COMP_CD, USR_ID, ROLE_ID, REG_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{usrId}, #{roleId}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, COMP_CD, USR_ID, USR_NM, LOGIN_ID, DEPT_CD, POS_CD, EMAIL, MOBILE, PURC_GRP_CD, LANG_CD, USR_TYP, VD_CD, USE_YN FROM CM_USER WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
AND (USR_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR USR_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR LOGIN_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY USR_ID
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CM_USER WHERE COMP_CD = #{compCd} AND USR_ID = #{usrId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE CM_USER SET USR_NM = #{usrNm}, DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}, POS_CD = #{posCd}, EMAIL = #{email}, MOBILE = #{mobile}, PURC_GRP_CD = #{purcGrpCd}, LANG_CD = #{langCd}, USR_TYP = #{usrTyp}, VD_CD = #{vdCd}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE CM_USER SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE CM_USER SET PWD_HASH = #{pwdHash}, PWD_FAIL_CNT = 0, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CM_USER_ROLE WHERE COMP_CD = #{compCd} AND USR_ID = #{usrId}
